{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Horn of the Slumbering Wraith
| introduced = cradle-12-waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Horn of the Slumbering Wraith]] warps the air and twists ordinary animals into lesser [[dreadbeasts]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c24">''Waybound'', chapter 24</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
